summary: Verified two frontend change requests plus regression on portfolio site. Project card links updated correctly (README.md for luxury project, forecasting ML repo for second project) with target=_blank. Certifications section title updated to 'Credentials & certifications.' with kicker CERTIFICATIONS and index / 06 intact. All 8 cert-N verify links present, navbar smooth-scroll (nav-work → #work) working, contact form submits successfully with 'Message sent — I'll get back to you soon.' toast. Zero console/page errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Change requests verified via Playwright: project-card-0 href = luxury README URL, project-card-1 href = forecasting ML URL, both target=_blank. Certifications SectionHeader title text 'Credentials & certifications.' (kicker rendered uppercase via CSS as 'CERTIFICATIONS'). Contact form success toast 'Message sent — I'll get back to you soon.' Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. No auth involved.
verified_assertions: Certifications section shows '/ 06', 'CERTIFICATIONS' kicker, 'Credentials & certifications.' title
Old title 'Verified, not vibes.' no longer present
cert-0 through cert-7 anchors present with valid http(s) hrefs
nav-work click smooth-scrolls to #work in viewport
Contact form submit shows success toast 'Message sent — I'll get back to you soon.'
Zero console errors and zero page errors on load and interactions
